mapper.insert:
insert into test_report_template(report_code, product_id, report_name, report_file_uri, is_available, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.reportCode}, #{entity.productId}, #{entity.reportName}, #{entity.reportFileUri}, #{entity.isAvailable}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})

insert into test_report_template(report_code, product_id, report_name, report_file_uri, is_available, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.reportCode}, #{entity.productId}, #{entity.reportName}, #{entity.reportFileUri}, #{entity.isAvailable}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})
on duplicate key update report_code = values(report_code) , product_id = values(product_id) , report_name = values(report_name) , report_file_uri = values(report_file_uri) , is_available = values(is_available) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time) , remark = values(remark)
mapper.select: select report_standard from test_report_template where report_file_uri like concat('%',#{url},'%')
